microsoft_ft: Partnered with enterprise customers (**Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp**) to articulate Azure's resilience value proposition, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized program sustaining **45+ annual drills** and driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, owning technical requirements and self-service POV-style workflows that cut operational toil by **30%** and unlocked customer-led validation at scale.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and shaping a new model for continuous observability validation.

Owned technical engagement on **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** and restructured planning workflows using LLM-powered automation, reducing planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by **21%** across distributed Azure service teams.

Captured customer wins, losses, and competitive feedback in structured CRM notes, channeling insights back to product and engineering teams to **prioritize features** across observability and recovery roadmaps.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by delivering hands-on demos and technical briefings to 14 Azure service teams, driving utilization that saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ technical discovery interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps and competitive differentiators.

Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool (RAG-style retrieval) with enforced metadata standards, cutting customer lookup time by **83%** and improving evaluation experience for trial users.
microsoft_2022: Accelerated **$3M in revenue** and launched Azure regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ service teams**.

Drove technical discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and executed an automation roadmap targeting critical paths in the deployment pipeline.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with the visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact engineering investment.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the technical strategy and mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations** in active fulfillment environments.
Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** — sprint planning, standups, retros — prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and reducing release friction across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Lifted job bookings by **26%** by rolling out a new CRM process and owning end-to-end scoping and invoicing for **200+ monthly proposals**, tightening the sales pipeline.
Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy across web and Google Business presence.
Sealed margin leaks by running **profitability analysis on 1,000+ project records**, delivering data-backed pricing model recommendations adopted by leadership.
